title: Queue Entry
description: The durable publish-queue record (one '## Entry' block in publish-queue.md). Grounded in the canonical queue field order; this is the v1 documented baseline and MAY change between minor versions with migration notes (spec §7.1, §11.1). Field VALUES are instance data and live only under $CONTENT_HOME; artifact-reference fields are CONTENT_HOME-relative (absolute paths are forbidden).

content_id.description: Stable identifier for the content item; also the queue entry header.

brand.description: Brand id this item belongs to (de-localized from the production 'account' field, spec §0.3 rule 6).

platform.description: Platform descriptor id (e.g. twitter, giphy, instagram, facebook, youtube).

format.description: Content format (e.g. text, thread, image, video, reel, short, carousel, gif).

mode.description: Pipeline mode the item was produced under.

content_form.description: Content form (DD-15/DD-16; spec §7.1). Defaults to standalone for non-trend items.

state.description: Queue lifecycle state (durable store authoritative from packaging onward; spec §8.2).

state_updated_at.description: Timestamp of the last state transition.

approved_by.description: Reviewer id from the allowlist that recorded the approval decision (DD-17).

approved_at.description: When the approval decision was recorded.

decision_message_ref.description: Reference to the approval-surface message carrying the decision (placeholder id; not an absolute path).

package_ref.description: CONTENT_HOME-relative reference to the package artifact (spec §7.4).

media_refs.description: CONTENT_HOME-relative references to the selected media assets.

preview_message_ref.description: Reference to the posted approval-card message (placeholder id; not an absolute path).

gates.description: Per-gate result block carrying detected codes from the unified registry (spec §7.2, §7.3, §10.2).

validation_ref.description: CONTENT_HOME-relative reference to the validation-result artifact (spec §7.2).

trend_source_ref.description: For trend-derived items: reference to the source Trend Report (spec §6.7, §7.1). Absent for non-trend items.

freshness_window.description: Inherited freshness window for trend-derived items; drives the approval-card TTL (DD-15). Absent for non-trend items.

expires_basis.description: What the expiry/TTL is computed from for trend-derived items (e.g. the trend report's freshness window).

attempt_count.description: Publish attempt counter, durably incremented BEFORE retry spend (DD-13).

publish_intent.description: Write-ahead intent marker recorded before the external publisher call (DD-4).

external_post_ref.description: Publisher-assigned reference (post/draft id) returned by the publisher adapter.

published_at.description: When the item was confirmed published.

schedule_time.description: Scheduled publish time inherited from the calendar slot (DD-22).

error.description: Last executor error string, when in a failure/hold state.

hold_reason.description: Reason the item is held (e.g. crash quarantine, retry exhaustion).
